response.justification: Bogdan brings roughly 20 years of polyglot engineering experience and some timely exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling in his current role, but he falls well short of the director-level AI-strategy profile this position demands. There is no evidence of recognized AI expertise — no advanced degree, no scaled AI products shipped, no published research or industry recognition — and his AI work began only in April 2025, remaining tooling-focused rather than strategic. The role centers on advising C-suite customers, shaping cloud AI strategy at scale, and inspiring broad technical communities, none of which surface in the resume; Bogdan's track record is that of a strong hands-on individual contributor, not a director-level technical strategist.
strengths: Approximately 20 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial background via GISCollective (founded 2016, still active) and early-stage startup experience at WatchUp demonstrates builder mentality
Current work on MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks shows relevant and timely hands-on exposure to the AI tooling space
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or a related field, and no recognizable AI thought leadership through patents, publications, conference keynotes, or widely adopted AI products
AI experience is nascent and narrow — limited to MCP tooling since April 2025 with no evidence of designing or shipping AI-powered platforms at any meaningful scale

No visible track record of operating at director level: no strategic customer advisory, organizational influence across business units, or external technical evangelism beyond small community workshops

key_factors.factor: No strategic or advisory leadership track record
